mechanism: Existing distributions are treated as natural or deserved
Need is filtered through moralized judgments of recipients
possible_dampener: Separate need vulnerability agency and structural constraint

mechanism: Visible success is mistaken for pure merit
possible_dampener: Analyze starting points opportunity and inherited advantage

mechanism: Recipients outside the ingroup are judged less deserving
possible_dampener: Perspective taking and consistent standards across groups

mechanism: Fair-looking procedures hide unequal access or unequal burden
possible_dampener: Audit procedure outcomes appeal access and affected testimony

mechanism: Historical injustice is excluded from present distributive judgment
possible_dampener: Document historical continuity and repair claims
Require explicit principle selection and consistency checks
